title: Hidden Colors 2: The Triumph of Melanin
original_title: Hidden Colors 2: The Triumph of Melanin
overview: This installment covers topics such as the global African presence, the science of melanin, the truth about the prison industrial complex, how thriving black economic communities were undermined in America, and the hidden truth about Native Americans.
